payload.answer: I can offer ways to handle this family-context detail without saving anything yet.
repair_options: Add a new family relationship fact: Nur and Sara are your twin daughters.
Keep this as contextual clarification only for the current conversation, without adding it to memory.
If existing memories mention Nur or Sara separately, link both to you as daughters and note that they are twins, pending your confirmation.
If an existing memory conflicts with this, ask you to choose whether to replace the older relationship detail or keep both with uncertainty.
